title: Trump weakens Netanyahu by forcing him to delay attack on Beirut
subhead: The US president ordered Israel not to attack the Lebanese capital. As with Gaza or Iran, only Donald Trump can restrain Israel's military force. This has caused frustration within the country's governing coalition, further weakening Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

title: Iconic glass brand Duralex placed under receivership
The Fontainebleau Forest's ever-growing popularity threatens this jewel of biodiversity near Paris
EU adopts drastic expulsion rules for undocumented migrants, including 'return platforms'
subhead: In addition to tougher sanctions against those denied asylum, EU member states, the European Parliament and the Commission are authorizing the creation of detention centers abroad where migrants can be sent.

title: Why consumer electronics prices are surging
subhead: Component prices have surged in recent months, driven by both the race to develop artificial intelligence and by the war in Iran. This trend is now affecting consumer electronics, with no respite expected in the short term.

title: French presidential election: 'Which of Attal or Glucksmann can form the broadest coalition'
subhead: Does the social-democratic space still have a future, or is it destined to merge into a broad central bloc? That is one of the key issues in the presidential pre-campaign that has just begun, writes Le Monde columnist Françoise Fressoz.

title: Putin faces a series of setbacks, fueling discontent in Russia and raising doubts about his strategy
subhead: While the Russian president claims that victory in Ukraine is within reach, Kyiv is stepping up drone strikes deep inside Russian territory. These military setbacks compound the country's mounting economic difficulties.

Elon Musk, SpaceX and the illusion of wealth
subhead: The upcoming stock market listing of SpaceX values the company, of which the billionaire owns less than 50%, at nearly $2 trillion. This figure relies on the success of projects that are unrealistic within any reasonable financial timeframe, such as establishing a colony on Mars or building data centers in space.

title: Capture of Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon is both a strategic asset and a historical burden for Israel
subhead: Twenty-six years after their withdrawal, Israeli soldiers entered the Crusader fortress overlooking the Litani River on Sunday. The move provided a new bargaining chip in negotiations with the Lebanese, which are set to resume in Washington on June 2 and 3.

title: French sociologist, philosopher and intellectual provocateur Edgar Morin has died aged 104
subhead: Committed to connecting different fields of knowledge to develop his 'complex thought,' this former member of the Resistance and deeply humanist intellectual advocated for a revolution of consciousness. He died in Paris on Friday, his wife confirmed to Le Monde.
